title: Private/Internal Forms
excerpt: We would like to use forms for private internal use. From my understanding, not only are forms accessible publicly with the URL, they are being indexed by Google. Unfortunately, there is no way we can use them like that.…

posts.author: malkuth23 (Matt NS)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to use forms for private internal use. From my understanding, not only are forms accessible publicly with the URL, they are being indexed by Google. Unfortunately, there is no way we can use them like that. We would like to request that forms have an option to be private and only accessible for people in our company.
